overall.description: Gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a character traversing a desolate rocky coastal landscape. The character wades through shallow water, navigates basalt rock formations, and climbs a cliff to reveal a massive waterfall vista under an overcast sky with a circular rainbow halo.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow coastal waters with columnar basalt formations

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water along the rocky coastline with basalt columns to the right

entered.detail: atmospheric circular halo visible in the overcast sky above
tall hexagonal basalt columns forming a rocky wall along the shore
shallow dark water covering the rocky ground
foggy coastline visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through shallow coastal waters along a desolate shoreline. Basalt rock columns rise to the right while a circular rainbow halo appears in the overcast sky above. The terrain is completely natural with no vegetation or other people visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky terrain with hexagonal basalt formations

events.description: character exits shallow water and steps onto rocky shore terrain

agents.ego_description: climbing out of the water onto rocky terrain and navigating between basalt rock formations

entered.detail: dark volcanic rock ground with scattered stones
patches of dry grass appearing between rocks
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from water to land, climbing onto rocky terrain surrounded by hexagonal basalt columns. Sparse vegetation appears as the character moves inland, with distant mountains visible through the haze.

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky shoreline with the ocean visible to the right

entered.detail: open sea with gentle waves extending to the horizon
scattered rock outcroppings in the water near shore
tall cliff formations visible across the water

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a rocky beach with the ocean to the right. The terrain consists of dark volcanic gravel and scattered boulders, with sea stacks and distant cliffs visible through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliff edge overlooking massive waterfall and valley

events.description: screen fades transitioning to grassy rocky plateau with different lighting
character reaches cliff edge revealing massive waterfall cascading into misty valley below

agents.ego_description: ascending rocky terrain and stopping at cliff edge to observe the panoramic waterfall vista

entered.detail: elevated terrain with patches of green grass among dark rocks
enormous waterfall cascading down into the valley with heavy mist
deep valley filled with white mist below the cliff edge
distant mountains with snow-covered summits visible beyond the waterfall

segments.scene_description: After a brief transition, the character emerges onto a grassy rocky plateau and climbs toward a cliff edge. Upon reaching the precipice, a breathtaking view reveals a massive waterfall cascading into a mist-filled valley, with snow-capped mountains rising in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, watery shoreline toward a towering mountain vista. It begins with the character wading through shallow coastal waters beneath an overcast sky featuring a circular rainbow halo, with basalt columns rising to the right. As the character transitions from the water to land, the scene shifts through fields of hexagonal basalt and sparse vegetation before moving across a dark volcanic beach of gravel and boulders. The camera then follows the ascent onto a grassy rocky plateau, climbing toward a precipice. Finally, the view opens wide to reveal a massive waterfall cascading into a mist-filled valley with snow-capped mountains rising in the distance.
